---
title: 'First Draft First Novel... Done! On to Edits...'
date: '2016-08-03T05:54:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4038411757353923986'
blogger_filename: '/2016/08/first-draft-first-novel-done-on-to-edits.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Fiction'
  - 'News & Updates'
---

<br />
<br />
<h3 style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; margin: 0px; position: relative;">
So... I completed the first draft of my short novel White Noise - The Tower (Episode 1).&nbsp;</h3>
<br style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;">You can read it (warts and all) below. I'm going to go back through and start editing (I already have). But it's mostly done now. I've also roughed out a book cover (we'll see if I stick with this direction).</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;">Of course, I'm taking a big risk by calling it "Episode 1"... that means I have to write Episode 2, 3, &amp; 4 at least. (That's where I have the story sketched out to at this point.</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;">I hope you enjoy!</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;"><br /></span>
<span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;">(Click <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2016/08/white-noise-tower-first-complete-draft.html" target="_blank">here </a>to read online) OR, email <a href="mailto:Me@DarrellWolfe.com" target="_blank">Me@DarrellWolfe.com</a> and I'll put you on a list to be a beta reader when the final edits are done.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;"><br /></span>
<span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;">Comment on this post or the Author Fun post about the Book Cover. Any feedback will be taken into consideration.</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;"><br /></span>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/white-noise-the-tower-cover-73777c8187bc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="460" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/white-noise-the-tower-cover-920abcb3b5fd.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<span style="background-color: white; color: #444444; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 13.2px; line-height: 18.48px;"><br /></span>
